displayText.headline: Engineered to Endure
displayText.subheading: Machined from solid aerospace billet and fitted with sapphire crystal.

style: commercial product photography minimalist modern Studio Reflective deep charcoal background reflective black glass gold accents
description: Implementing the Studio Reflective layout template: The premium mechanical objects are carefully positioned on a highly polished, reflective black glass pane. A deep charcoal gray background fades into obsidian shadows, while a precise, narrow overhead spotlight creates a perfect, crisp mirrored reflection underneath the titanium housing. The gold accent branding is subtly embossed in the top corner.
